policy.note: This guard validates fixture contracts only. It does not install tools or create fixtures.

findings.message: Contracts schema_version must be 0.1.
Contracts report must be ready.
Report must be fixture-contracts-only.
Report must not install tools.
Report must not clone repositories.
Report must not read private content.
Report must not run private OCR.
Report must not run private embeddings.
Report must not run training.
Report must keep public-ready at 0.
Report must include at least eight contracts.
